analysis.name: ARK
analysis.summary: ARK是一个采用DPoS共识的老牌L1项目，近期因Solana链上出现同名meme币（ARK/USDC）而价格暴涨，但该meme币与原始ARK项目无关，流动性极低，24小时交易量仅约4美元，风险极高。原始ARK代币24小时涨幅25%，但基本面无重大变化，上涨可能由meme币情绪带动或短期资金推动。建议强烈回避。

recommendation.invalidation: 若出现官方重大合作或基本面改善，但当前无任何迹象。

catalysts: Solana链上出现同名meme币ARK/USDC，可能引发投机情绪
原始ARK代币24小时涨幅25%，但缺乏明确利好

latestNews.title: Ark Invest Snaps Up Coinbase and Robinhood Amid Market Slide
latestNews.reason: 新闻涉及Ark Invest（投资公司），与ARK代币无关，但可能造成名称混淆。

latestNews.title: Ark Invest Director: AAVE, SOL, ETH Among ‘Overlooked’ Crypto Assets With Strong Fundamentals
latestNews.reason: 同样为Ark Invest相关，非ARK项目。

latestNews.title: Cathie Wood's ARK Invest Buys Coinbase And Circle Across Two Sessions
latestNews.reason: Ark Invest交易活动，与ARK代币无关。

fundamentals: ARK是2017年启动的L1项目，采用DPoS共识，51个验证节点。
总供应量1.97亿枚，已全部流通，无通胀压力。
市值约2543万美元（原始ARK），排名706。
项目活跃度低，官网和社区更新较少。
marketRead: 原始ARK代币24小时涨幅25%，但成交量仅2112万美元，换手率较高。
Solana链上meme币ARK/USDC流动性高达9315万美元，但24小时交易量仅4美元，存在严重流动性陷阱。
meme币价格0.4957美元，与原始ARK价格0.1289美元差异大，明显是不同资产。
risks: 名称混淆风险：ARK代币与Ark Invest及Solana meme币同名，易误导投资者。
meme币流动性极低，交易量几乎为零，存在拉高出货或rug pull风险。
原始ARK项目缺乏新进展，上涨无基本面支撑，可能为短期炒作。
新闻均为Ark Invest相关，与ARK项目无关，市场情绪可能误读。
watchlist: 原始ARK项目是否有官方公告或合作。
Solana链上meme币ARK/USDC的流动性变化和交易量。
市场整体情绪及meme币板块热度。
sourceNotes: 数据来源为CoinGecko和DexScreener，meme币数据可靠性低。
新闻标题中'Ark Invest'与ARK代币无关，需注意区分。

profile.name: ARK
profile.description: ARK provides users, developers, and startups with innovative blockchain technologies. They aim to create an entire ecosystem of linked chains and a virtual spiderweb of endless use-cases that make ARK highly flexible, adaptable, and scalable. ARK is a secure platform designed for mass adoption and will deliver the services that consumers want and developers need. It is fast, decentralized, scalable, collaborative, bridging and open-source. The ARK Desktop Wallet is natively built for all major Operating Systems. ARK wallets connect to fully synced network peers removing the need to download the full blockchain. ARK operates using a Delegated Proof-of-Stake (DPoS) consensus algorithm. Unlike Bitcoin, in which miners with expensive rigs secure network transactions, the ARK network is secured by delegates. There are hundreds of potential delegates, but token holders in the ARK ecosystem continuously vote on who actually gets to be an active, forging delegate. Only 51 delegates make the cut. As a token holder, you’re only allowed to vote for one delegate at a time. The fee to vote/unvote is just 1 ARK, so it’s advantageous to at least vote once for a delegate you support. The more ARK
